titulo: Inspirational Quote Stories Pipeline (AI + Design + Publishing)
descricao: Weekly, generates 30 quotes with OpenAI, creates story images via Placid, sends them for approval by email, and publishes daily to Instagram and Facebook across multiple accounts.
problema: Creating and publishing daily stories was 100% manual — from writing the quotes to uploading them to each social network.
resultado: A full pipeline: generation, design, approval and automatic publishing across multiple accounts.
metrica: 30 stories generated per week with automatic daily publishing
